Door guardians are statues that are placed on either side of a door. They symbolically denote the opening and closing of a space.
[[Category:Lifeism 2.0]]
[[sn:Door guardian]][[Foo Dogs|Foo dogs]] are the main door guardians, but others include Lamassu and Gargoyles

[[Category:Door guardians]]
[[sn:Door guardian]][[Category:Low religion]]
[[sn:Door guardian]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
